name: MITRE.LIN.T1210.RULE Exploitation of Remote Services
notes:
No action required
Get more Linux MITRE rules: https://www.scnsoft.com/services/security/siem/linux-mitre-attack-rules
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:MITRE.LIN.T1210: Exploitation of Remote Services
when the source is vulnerable to any exploit on any port
TD_list: APPLY MITRE.LIN.T1210.RULE Exploitation of Remote Services on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:MITRE.LIN.T1210: Exploitation of Remote Services
AND when the source is vulnerable to any exploit on any port
RED_list: Event name: MITRE.LIN.T1210.RULE Exploitation of Remote Services

Event description: An adversary may need to determine if the remote system is in a vulnerable state. Servers are likely a high value target for lateral movement exploitation, but endpoint systems may also be at risk if they provide an advantage or access to additional resources.
See more on: https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1210
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
Include detected events by "Source IP" from this point forward, in the offense, for 0 second(s)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
